Based on your screening criteria:

**Best CSP:**
NFLX $90 strike, 2026-05-29, 36 DTE, $1.90/$1.94, delta 0.33, 21.6% annualized return
- Quality stock with 90.9% IVP, good pullback setup

**Best CC (Position Income):**
GOOGL $360 strike, 2026-06-18, 56 DTE, $10.65/$11.05, delta 0.36, 20.8% annualized return
- Strong profit position, good premium capture

**LEAPS/PMCC:**
No qualifying trades - all LEAPS show "WAIT" signals due to falling trends or expensive IVP levels

**Bull Call Spreads:**
None available

High volatility environment with most names showing 75%+ IVP - excellent for premium selling, poor for LEAPS buying.
